message:
feat(stats,conformance): add instantaneous ops/sec sampling, network byte counters, comprehensive conformance tests

- Add 16-slot ring buffer ops/sec sampling in Store with record_ops_sec_sample()
- Add stat_total_net_input_bytes / stat_total_net_output_bytes counters
- Add instantaneous_input_kbps / instantaneous_output_kbps throughput tracking
- Wire all new stats into INFO stats section (replacing hardcoded zeros)
- Instrument fr-server I/O paths for byte counting via Runtime API
- Add periodic sampling in main event loop (every 100ms)
- Fix incrbyfloat test: Redis rejects infinity results, not accepts them
- Correct HINCRBYFLOAT conformance fixtures for infinity rejection
- Add 29 dedicated conformance_core_* test functions via macro for all fixture families
- All 1300+ workspace tests pass, clippy clean

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
